'''竏喃-ch-v-d''' ('''kafachvedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yoik|yoik]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-ch-v-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yoik|yoik]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喃-ch-v-d
|-
! Lemma
| kafachvedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifachvedoko|thifachvedoko]] || [[word:jifachvedoko|jifachvedoko]] || [[word:shifachvedoko|shifachvedoko]] || [[word:kifachvedoko|kifachvedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufachvedoko|thuthufachvedoko]] || [[word:jujufachvedoko|jujufachvedoko]] || [[word:shushufachvedoko|shushufachvedoko]] || [[word:kukufachvedoko|kukufachvedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufachvedoko|thufachvedoko]] || [[word:jufachvedoko|jufachvedoko]] || [[word:shufachvedoko|shufachvedoko]] || [[word:kufachvedoko|kufachvedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufachvedoko|thufachvedoko]] || [[word:jufachvedoko|jufachvedoko]] || [[word:shufachvedoko|shufachvedoko]] || [[word:kufachvedoko|kufachvedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefachvedoko|thefachvedoko]] || [[word:jefachvedoko|jefachvedoko]] || [[word:shefachvedoko|shefachvedoko]] || [[word:kefachvedoko|kefachvedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofachvedoko|thothofachvedoko]] || [[word:jojofachvedoko|jojofachvedoko]] || [[word:shoshofachvedoko|shoshofachvedoko]] || [[word:kokofachvedoko|kokofachvedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofachvedoko|thofachvedoko]] || [[word:jofachvedoko|jofachvedoko]] || [[word:shofachvedoko|shofachvedoko]] || [[word:kofachvedoko|kofachvedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofachvedoko|thofachvedoko]] || [[word:jofachvedoko|jofachvedoko]] || [[word:shofachvedoko|shofachvedoko]] || [[word:kofachvedoko|kofachvedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦfachvedoko|thﾃｦfachvedoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦfachvedoko|jﾃｦfachvedoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦfachvedoko|shﾃｦfachvedoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦfachvedoko|kﾃｦfachvedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafachvedoko|thathafachvedoko]] || [[word:jajafachvedoko|jajafachvedoko]] || [[word:shashafachvedoko|shashafachvedoko]] || [[word:kakafachvedoko|kakafachvedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafachvedoko|thafachvedoko]] || [[word:jafachvedoko|jafachvedoko]] || [[word:shafachvedoko|shafachvedoko]] || [[word:kafachvedoko|kafachvedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafachvedoko|thafachvedoko]] || [[word:jafachvedoko|jafachvedoko]] || [[word:shafachvedoko|shafachvedoko]] || [[word:kafachvedoko|kafachvedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shafachvedithi|shafachvedithi]] || [[word:shafachvediji|shafachvediji]] || [[word:shafachvedishi|shafachvedishi]] || [[word:shafachvediki|shafachvediki]]
